LinearLayout.LinearLayout:
<Button android:id="@+id/button0" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="133dp" android:layout_weight="1" <<<<<<< Updated upstream android:text="Button" /> ======= android:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF" android:padding="0dp" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="#000000" android:textColorLink="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="96sp" /> >>>>>>> Stashed changes
